title: 读取处理器与 NUMA 拓扑
code:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

# --- A: 主机逻辑处理器 (每个 LP 一个实例; DeviceID 编码 hypervisor LP 下标) ---
$hostProcs=@(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_Processor)
'HostLogicalProcessors = '+$hostProcs.Count
$s=$hostProcs|Select-Object -First 1
'DeviceID = '+$s.DeviceID
'MaxClockSpeed(MHz) = '+$s.MaxClockSpeed

# 对照 Win32_Processor 的 socket/core 视图
$w32=@(Get-WmiObject -Class Win32_Processor)
'Win32 Cores = '+($w32|Measure-Object NumberOfCores -Sum).Sum+' LP = '+($w32|Measure-Object NumberOfLogicalProcessors -Sum).Sum

# --- B: 主机 NUMA ---
$numa=@(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_NumaNode)
'HostNumaNodes = '+$numa.Count
'Numa[0] NodeID = '+($numa|Select-Object -First 1).NodeID

# --- C: ProcessorSettingData 的 NUMA 投影字段 (创建临时第二代虚拟机读默认值后删除) ---
$vmName='WMITEST_processor_topology'; $vm=$null
try {
  $vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
  $vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\root\virtualization\v2:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
  $vssd.ElementName=$vmName; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
  $r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
  if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
  $vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
  $vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  $proc=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_ProcessorSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  'PSD MaxProcessorsPerNumaNode = '+$proc.MaxProcessorsPerNumaNode
  'PSD MaxNumaNodesPerSocket    = '+$proc.MaxNumaNodesPerSocket
  'PSD HwThreadsPerCore         = '+$proc.HwThreadsPerCore
  'VSSD VirtualNumaEnabled      = '+$vssd2.VirtualNumaEnabled
}
finally {
  if($vm -and $vm.__PATH){ $d=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $d.Job | Out-Null } }
}
code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

# --- A: Host logical processors (one instance per LP; DeviceID encodes the hypervisor LP index) ---
$hostProcs=@(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_Processor)
'HostLogicalProcessors = '+$hostProcs.Count
$s=$hostProcs|Select-Object -First 1
'DeviceID = '+$s.DeviceID
'MaxClockSpeed(MHz) = '+$s.MaxClockSpeed

# Compare against the socket/core view of Win32_Processor
$w32=@(Get-WmiObject -Class Win32_Processor)
'Win32 Cores = '+($w32|Measure-Object NumberOfCores -Sum).Sum+' LP = '+($w32|Measure-Object NumberOfLogicalProcessors -Sum).Sum

# --- B: Host NUMA ---
$numa=@(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_NumaNode)
'HostNumaNodes = '+$numa.Count
'Numa[0] NodeID = '+($numa|Select-Object -First 1).NodeID

# --- C: The NUMA projection fields of ProcessorSettingData (create a temporary generation 2 virtual machine, read the default values, then delete it) ---
$vmName='WMITEST_processor_topology'; $vm=$null
try {
  $vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
  $vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\root\virtualization\v2:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
  $vssd.ElementName=$vmName; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
  $r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
  if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
  $vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
  $vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  $proc=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_ProcessorSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  'PSD MaxProcessorsPerNumaNode = '+$proc.MaxProcessorsPerNumaNode
  'PSD MaxNumaNodesPerSocket    = '+$proc.MaxNumaNodesPerSocket
  'PSD HwThreadsPerCore         = '+$proc.HwThreadsPerCore
  'VSSD VirtualNumaEnabled      = '+$vssd2.VirtualNumaEnabled
}
finally {
  if($vm -and $vm.__PATH){ $d=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $d.Job | Out-Null } }
}
output:
HostLogicalProcessors(Msvm_Processor count) = 56
Sample DeviceID = Microsoft:B637F347-6A0E-4DEC-AF52-BD70CB80A21D\0\0
Sample MaxClockSpeed(MHz) = 3686
Sample EnabledState = 2
Win32 Sockets=1 Cores=24 LogicalProcs=24 Name=Intel(R) Core(TM) Ultra 7 270K Plus
HostNumaNodes(Msvm_NumaNode count) = 1
Numa[0] NodeID = Microsoft:PhysicalNode\0
PSD MaxProcessorsPerNumaNode = 24
PSD MaxNumaNodesPerSocket = 1
PSD HwThreadsPerCore = 0
VSSD VirtualNumaEnabled = True
Cleanup DestroySystem rv=4096
Residual WMITEST count = 0
RESULT: PASS
notes: 纯读操作。主机物理拓扑经 Msvm_Processor（每个逻辑处理器一个实例）与 Msvm_NumaNode（每个物理 NUMA 节点一个实例）枚举。
Msvm_Processor.DeviceID 格式为 'Microsoft:<GUID>\<socket>\<lp>'，ElementName 为本地化的“逻辑处理器 N”。
计数口径差异：root\virtualization\v2 下的 Msvm_Processor 计的是 hypervisor 视角的逻辑处理器（含全部硬件线程），Win32_Processor 反映 socket/core 视图，两者数值不可直接互换。
MaxProcessorsPerNumaNode 与 MaxNumaNodesPerSocket 是 Msvm_ProcessorSettingData（每虚拟机）上的 NUMA 投影字段，不在主机 Msvm_Processor 上，需经虚拟机的 VSSD -> ProcessorSettingData 读取。
HwThreadsPerCore=0 表示继承主机设置。VirtualNumaEnabled 位于 VSSD，默认为 True。
单 NUMA 节点环境的 NodeID 形如 Microsoft:PhysicalNode\0，无跨节点拓扑。DestroySystem 可能异步返回 4096，需 Wait-Job2 等待完成。
notes_en: A pure read operation. The host physical topology is enumerated through Msvm_Processor (one instance per logical processor) and Msvm_NumaNode (one instance per physical NUMA node).
Msvm_Processor.DeviceID has the format 'Microsoft:<GUID>\<socket>\<lp>', and ElementName is the localized "Logical Processor N".

Counting semantics differ: Msvm_Processor under root\virtualization\v2 counts logical processors from the hypervisor perspective (including all hardware threads), whereas Win32_Processor reflects the socket/core view; the two values are not directly interchangeable.

MaxProcessorsPerNumaNode and MaxNumaNodesPerSocket are NUMA projection fields on Msvm_ProcessorSettingData (per virtual machine), not on the host Msvm_Processor, and must be read through the virtual machine's VSSD -> ProcessorSettingData.
HwThreadsPerCore=0 means the host setting is inherited. VirtualNumaEnabled resides on the VSSD and defaults to True.

In a single-NUMA-node environment the NodeID has the form Microsoft:PhysicalNode\0, with no cross-node topology. DestroySystem may return 4096 asynchronously, so Wait-Job2 is required to wait for completion.
